name: callytics
description: Self-hosted open source call center platform

scripts.test:fast: npm run test:fast --workspace stasis && npm run test:fast --workspace backend
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:ci --workspace stasis && npm run test:ci --workspace backend && npm run test:ci --workspace frontend
scripts.test:full: npm run test:full --workspace stasis && npm run test:full --workspace backend && npm run test:full --workspace frontend
scripts.test:unit: npm run test --workspace stasis && npm run test:unit --workspace backend
scripts.dev:rebuild:app: docker compose up -d --build backend stasis frontend
